name: gb200_multibox
_comment: NVIDIA GB200 multi-rack deployment template. Each rack is one NVL72 island (72-port NVSwitch5, NVLS-capable, 0.5 us SW alpha / 0.2 us INC alpha) stitched by Quantum-2 InfiniBand (SHARP-capable, 2.5 us SW alpha / 0.4 us INC alpha, 400 GB/s/port). num_devices and ib.ports are auto-overridden by `system_with_eta(num_devices=N)`: ib.ports = ceil(N / 72). Default N=576 (8 racks). Rack chip is Blackwell B200 (192 GB HBM3E @ 8 TB/s, 2250 TF FP16 dense, hbm_eta_beta=0.7). Fabric INC capability is disclosed at the hardware level; whether the runtime engages NVLS / SHARP is a framework decision (`FrameworkSpec.inc_enabled`). For the no-INC counterpart (production stacks that opt out of SHARP) keep this spec and set `inc_enabled=False` on the framework. For an idealized single-tier 576-port crossbar (hypothetical perfect NVL576 fabric), use `gb200.nvl576.ideal.json`; for a rail-optimized 2-tier topology variant (alpha=2.0 us instead of 2.5 us, ib_rail fabric name) use `gb200.nvl576.rail.inc.json`.
